languages.text: "Казалось бы, очевидный вариант решения задачи, коллега". {n}Эоганн постукивает по оболочке батареи мехадендритом.{/n} "Но, увы, нерелевантный. Вся мощь Движущей Силы, хранимая в моих гальванических витках, насытит подъемник лишь на мгновение — слишком велика его жажда. Лишь генератор сможет ее утолить".

"An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."
languages.original_text: "Казалось бы, очевидный вариант решения задачи, коллега". {n}Эоганн постукивает по оболочке батареи мехадендритом.{/n} "Но, увы, нерелевантный. Вся мощь Движущей Силы, хранимая в моих гальванических витках, насытит подъемник лишь на мгновение — слишком велика его жажда. Лишь генератор сможет ее утолить".

traits.locale_text: "An obvious solution, one might think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

"An obvious solution, one might think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

"An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

"An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

languages.text: "Eine offensichtliche Lösung, möchte man meinen, Kollege." {n}Er tippt mit einem Mechadendriten auf die Hülle seiner Batterie.{/n} "Aber leider keine gangbare. Die gesamte Antriebskraft meiner galvanischen Zellen würde den Aufzug nur für einen kurzen Moment nähren, da sein Hunger zu groß ist. Nur der Generator kann ihn wirklich stillen."
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: "Eine offensichtliche Lösung, möchte man meinen, Kollege." {n}Er tippt mit einem Mechadendriten auf die Hülle seiner Batterie.{/n} "Aber leider keine gangbare. Die gesamte Antriebskraft meiner galvanischen Zellen würde den Aufzug nur für einen kurzen Moment nähren, da sein Hunger zu groß ist. Nur der Generator kann ihn wirklich stillen."

languages.text: « Oui, il s'agit à première vue de la solution la plus évidente, {n}déclare-t-il en tapotant le capot de sa batterie du bout d'une mécadendrite.{/n} Hélas, c'est impossible. La Force Motrice accumulée dans mes bobines galvaniques ne pourrait alimenter l'ascenseur que l'espace de quelques instants. Seul le générateur sera capable d'assouvir sa faim. »
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, il s'agit à première vue de la solution la plus évidente, {n}déclare-t-il en tapotant le capot de sa batterie du bout d'une mécadendrite.{/n} Hélas, c'est impossible. La Force Motrice accumulée dans mes bobines galvaniques ne pourrait alimenter l'ascenseur que l'espace de quelques instants. Seul le générateur sera capable d'assouvir sa faim. »

languages.text: “这看起来的确是一个可行的方案。”{n}他用一根机械触须敲了敲自己电池的外壳。{/n}“但可惜，行不通。我电流线圈里储存的所有源力，只够电梯运转片刻。它所需的能耗实在太大，唯有那台发电机才能完全满足。”
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: “这看起来的确是一个可行的方案。”{n}他用一根机械触须敲了敲自己电池的外壳。{/n}“但可惜，行不通。我电流线圈里储存的所有源力，只够电梯运转片刻。它所需的能耗实在太大，唯有那台发电机才能完全满足。”

languages.text: «Parecería una solución obvia, querid{mf|o|a} colega». {n}Toca la carcasa de la batería con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Sin embargo, no resultaría práctica. Toda la Fuerza Motriz que almacenan mis bobinas galvánicas solo bastaría para alimentar al ascensor durante un instante, ya que su hambre es mucho mayor. Necesitamos el generador para saciarla».
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: «Parecería una solución obvia, querid{mf|o|a} colega». {n}Toca la carcasa de la batería con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Sin embargo, no resultaría práctica. Toda la Fuerza Motriz que almacenan mis bobinas galvánicas solo bastaría para alimentar al ascensor durante un instante, ya que su hambre es mucho mayor. Necesitamos el generador para saciarla».

languages.text: 「明白な解決策だ、そう思うだろう、同僚よ」{n}彼はメカデンドライトでバッテリーのケーシングを叩く。{/n}「しかし、残念ながら適用できない。私のガルバニック・コイルに蓄積されたすべての原動力は、リフトをほんの一瞬しか維持できない。ジェネレーターだけがそれを満たすことができる。」
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: 「明白な解決策だ、そう思うだろう、同僚よ」{n}彼はメカデンドライトでバッテリーのケーシングを叩く。{/n}「しかし、残念ながら適用できない。私のガルバニック・コイルに蓄積されたすべての原動力は、リフトをほんの一瞬しか維持できない。ジェネレーターだけがそれを満たすことができる。」

languages.text: "Bunun bariz bir çözüm olduğunu düşünülebilir meslektaşım." {n}Bir mekadentrit ile bataryanın kasasına vuruyor.{/n} "Ancak ne yazık ki uygulanamaz bir çözüm. Galvaniz sargılarımda depolanan tüm Devinim Gücü, açlığı çok büyük olduğu için asansörü ancak bir anlığına ayakta tutabilir. Yalnızca jeneratör onu gerçekten doyurabilir."
languages.original_text: "An obvious solution, one would think, colleague." {n}He taps the casing of his battery with a mechadendrite.{/n} "But, alas, an inapplicable one. All the Motive Force stored within my galvanic coils would sustain the lift for but a moment, since its hunger is too great. Only the generator can truly sate it."

traits.locale_text: "Bunun bariz bir çözüm olduğunu düşünülebilir meslektaşım." {n}Bir mekadentrit ile bataryanın kasasına vuruyor.{/n} "Ancak ne yazık ki uygulanamaz bir çözüm. Galvaniz sargılarımda depolanan tüm Devinim Gücü, açlığı çok büyük olduğu için asansörü ancak bir anlığına ayakta tutabilir. Yalnızca jeneratör onu gerçekten doyurabilir."
